creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for your reply. I was just wondering which other commit you were referring to. None of the commit messages say anything about a security problem.

this is your patch:
http://sourceforge.net/p/bitchx/git/ci/726884b0b076d0a77f7f5c7866caa09a164e8ae9/

this is the history of the committes made in the past few months/years on dcc.h
http://sourceforge.net/p/bitchx/git/ci/04f5138a6c4a324d974b10fcc9fb98b23ee3f021/log/?path=/include/dcc.h

Could you please explain what exactly the security problem is.

Thanks
